EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of contacts incorrect phone number.
EmailTemplate.name: Post Sale - Incorrect Tel No
EmailTemplate.subject: Confirmation of Contact Details
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for choosing Kingsbridge for your business insurance.
I tried to call you today to make sure you have received all of your insurance documents and to answer any questions you may have about your policy. Unfortunately, the contact number we have on file appears to be incorrect.
It's important that we have the right contact details for you in case we need to get in touch about your policy. Could you please reply with your preferred telephone number at your earliest convenience.
Your feedback is very important to us and we would like to hear about your experience when purchasing your insurance. Our independent review service, Feefo, will be in touch via email asking you to provide feedback.
Please don't hesitate to get in touch on 01242 808 740 if you have any queries.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
